name: journal

name: freellmapi
description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that stacks the free tiers of 16 LLM providers (~1.7B tokens/month) behind one /v1 endpoint — plus any custom OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Smart routing, automatic failover, encrypted keys. Personal experimentation only.

name: scribe-text-tools-app
description: Oriz Scribe — text + writing tools (word count, case convert, lorem ipsum, slug, diff, sort lines, dedupe, find/replace, markdown→HTML, reading-time, readability score). Astro 6 + React 19 islands + Tailwind v4. Static, Cloudflare Pages at https://text.oriz.in. Free, no card-on-file.

name: forge-dev-tools-app
description: Oriz Forge — developer utilities (JSON/YAML/TOML/CSV convert, base64, JWT decode, regex tester, UUID gen, hash, color palette, cron explainer, URL→markdown). Astro 6 + React 19 islands + Tailwind v4. Static, Cloudflare Pages at https://dev.oriz.in. Free, no card-on-file.

name: echo-audio
description: Oriz Echo — audio tools (trim, merge, format convert, normalize loudness, silence trim, BPM detect, pitch shift). Astro 6 + React 19 islands + Tailwind v4 + FFmpeg.wasm (in-browser). Static, Cloudflare Pages at https://audio.oriz.in. Free, no card-on-file.

name: reel-video
description: Oriz Reel — video tools (trim, compress, format convert, gif↔mp4, frame extract, audio strip, subtitle burn-in). Astro 6 + React 19 islands + Tailwind v4 + FFmpeg.wasm (in-browser). Static, Cloudflare Pages at https://video.oriz.in. Free, no card-on-file.

name: pivot-data
description: Oriz Pivot — data + spreadsheet tools (CSV viewer, CSV↔JSON, sort, filter, pivot, dedupe, merge, schema diff, fake-data generator). Astro 6 + React 19 islands + Tailwind v4. Static, Cloudflare Pages at https://data.oriz.in. Free, no card-on-file.

name: paper-print
description: Oriz Paper — print-ready generators (label maker, name-tag, ID-card, business-card, planner-page, graph-paper, dot-grid). Astro 6 + React 19 islands + Tailwind v4 + pdf-lib. Outputs print-ready PDF. Static, Cloudflare Pages at https://print.oriz.in. Free, no card-on-file.
